SELECT toDecimal128OrZero(value, 2) AS decimal_value, toTypeName(decimal_value) FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal128OrZero(toString(sum(value)), 5) AS total_decimal_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL LIMIT 2);
SELECT a.value, toDecimal128OrZero(a.value, 6) AS converted_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS a WHERE NOT (a.value = 'Inf' OR a.value = 'NaN');
WITH (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '12%') AS subquery SELECT toDecimal128OrZero(subquery.value, 3) AS decimal_value FROM subquery;
SELECT a.num, toDecimal128OrZero(a.num, 4) AS converted_value FROM another_table AS a JOIN test_table AS t ON a.num = t.value;
SELECT a.value, b.num, toDecimal128OrZero(a.value, 1) + toDecimal128OrZero(b.num, 1) AS sum_decimal FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS a, (SELECT num FROM another_table) AS b;
SELECT toDecimal128OrZero(toString(avg(value)), 2) AS avg_decimal_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN ('NaN', 'Inf'));
WITH (SELECT toDecimal128OrZero('123.45678', 5)) AS decimal_val SELECT decimal_val, toTypeName(decimal_val);
